description: Dataset for Interpretable Machine Learning with mm-Gait Framework Explored Novel Gait Biomarkers in Early Parkinsons Disease Subtypes

QueryInsights is a learning-to-rank system that demonstrates how search results can be ordered using machine learning. It compares logistic regression and XGBoost models, evaluates ranking quality with NDCG@10, and simulates potential click-through improvements using an offline A/B framework.

Course project for the Machine Learning (Advanced) class at CEU. This repository implements a simple AutoML framework for regression using simulated annealing to select models and tune hyperparameters, with different temperature multipliers for model and hyperparameter changes. The approach is compared with TPOT and auto-sklearn.
This repository is for school assignments within the Machine Learning Framework area.

A machine learning framework, dataset and research sub-module about coevolutionary planetary intelligence dynamics. This project explores how nurturing its emergent patterns may lead to a synergistic increase in the overall capability and intelligence of both individual agents and the collective system.

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.

Machine learning-based framework for predicting solar panel efficiency degradation due to dust accumulation based on environmental and operational factors. The dataset used contains dust density, temperature, humidity, irradiation, and power output features. Multiple regression models have been developed and tested.

Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.

A decentralized framework for AI-based resource allocation in Open RAN optimizes network efficiency. It uses machine learning models, deployed at the network edge, to autonomously manage resources like spectrum and power, enhancing performance and scalability without a central controller.

Framework for aligning longitudinal Parkinsons Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) data with the Parkinsons Disease Ontology (PDON) and Movement Disorder Ontology (PMDO). Provides reproducible mapping, ontology instantiation, and ontology-informed machine learning workflows for analysing Parkinsons disease trajectories.
Context-Adaptive AgentLens Platform Utilizing Dynamic Spatial Awareness and Machine Learning Driven Optimization Framework.

Master's thesis codebase for evaluation of fusion strategies in clinical depression screening. Multimodal depression detection framework using Text, Audio, and Video modalities with Early and Late Fusion strategies. Implements Logistic Regression and XGBoost classifiers on E-DAIC dataset with SHAP and coefficient-based methods.
Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.
MULTI-evolve: a machine learning-guided end-to-end framework for engineering hyperactive multi-mutant proteins

Machine learning framework to identify and predict Lagrangian coherence of eddies in the Gulf of Mexico using ADT, SST, and chlorophyll-a. Improves classification and lifetime prediction of LCEs and LCFEs, with enhanced accuracy from Chl-a assimilation into ocean models

A multi-level obfuscation framework (mild, moderate, strong) for privacy-preserving machine learning on network-traffic data. Includes dataset balancing, obfuscation scripts, TabNet models, baseline ML benchmarks, and reproducible experiments.

This project presents a complete machine-learning framework designed to improve sustainable agriculture. It addresses the modern struggle with unpredictable crop yields, improper fertilizer application, and rising agricultural waste through an integrated approach combining Predictive Analytics and Computer Vision.
A multivariate machine learning framework for predicting student stress levels with 90%+ accuracy.
AI-driven predictive energy optimization framework combining machine learning, causal reasoning, and reinforcement learning for smart grid management.
A two-stage parameter estimation framework integrating Approximate Bayesian Computation and Machine Learning

Framework  for comprehensive variant detection in whole genome sequences using advanced machine learning models for cross domain pattern recognition in fitness, pharmacogenetics and nutritional aspects of sprint running
Interpretable machine-learning framework for chronic disease risk prediction using BRFSS survey data (20112015), with reproducible pipelines and Streamlit deployment.

A robust framework for formal verification of multi-agent systems powered by LLMs, ensuring safe and reliable decision-making. Integrates machine learning with formal methods to validate agent behaviors, safety constraints, and real-world simulations in critical domains like autonomous driving and robotics.
This work presents a hybrid machine learning and optimization framework for single machine non-preemptive total tardiness scheudling problems.

This repo showcases a collection of innovative Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL) projects, demonstrating expertise in cutting-edge technologies and algorithms. Explore this repo to find practical implementations and solutions for various AI-driven tasks.
Reference implementation of the Structural Physics-Informed Machine Learning (SPIML) framework for fractured aquifers.

This project presents an Intelligent Food Recognition System using a Hybrid Machine Learning Framework that combines Convolutional Neural Networks and Support Vector Machines for better accuracy. The system processes food images by preprocessing, extracting features, and classifying them based on their characteristics

Automated Detection of p-Hacking and Questionable Research Practices via Machine Learning: A Statistical Forensics Framework

A growing collection of fundamental Machine Learning algorithms implemented completely from scratch using Python and `numpy`. This repository serves as an educational resource to understand the inner workings of various ML models without relying on high-level frameworks like scikit-learn for the core logic.

TERV is an advanced Machine Learning validation and comparison framework designed to build, evaluate, and explain multiple classification models in a transparent and interpretable way.  It integrates traditional ML algorithms such as:  Linear Models  Logistic Regression  K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN)  Naive Bayes  Decision Tree  Random Forest

This repository showcases my journey in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Computer Vision  from data preprocessing and model training to real-time deployment using FastAPI, OpenCV, and modern ML frameworks. Each project is built with a focus on performance, explainability, and real-world applicability.
ustom torch style machine learning framework with automatic differentiation implemented on numpy, allows build GANs, VAEs, etc.

High-throughput machine learning pipeline designed to decode the regulatory logic of microexon splicing. The framework uses Support Vector Regression (SVR) to predict microexon inclusion levels (PSI) based on the expression profiles of Splicing Factors (SFs), utilizing SHAP values to identify the primary regulatory drivers.
A machine learning framework that uses stacked ensemble learning to combine Random Forest, XGBoost, Gradient Boosting, and Logistic Regression for improved predictive performance.
An easy-to-use Python package implementing the machine learning framework presented in "Precision culturomics enabled by unlabeled single-cell morphology and Raman spectra"
A Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) framework for spacecraft propulsion systems using high-frequency sensor data and machine learning for multi-class fault diagnosis.
A comparative machine learning framework for predicting physicochemical properties using 28 novel Weighted Sombor Indices.

NOVA is a tool for annotating and analyzing behaviours in social interactions. It supports Annotators using Machine Learning already during the coding process. Further it features both, discrete labels and continuous scores and a visuzalization of streams recorded with the SSI Framework.
A curated list of awesome machine learning frameworks, libraries and software (by language). I

A research-oriented framework for data-driven parameter optimization in BB84 quantum key distribution, integrating simulation, local search and machine learning.

Reinforcement learning framework for agricultural robots using n step and Double DQN policy learning to optimize spraying, planting, and harvesting decisions. Designed for integration with real machine vision pipelines to enable perception driven, resource efficient autonomous farm labor.
Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for multi-machine production scheduling with A3C and DQN algorithms
an open-sourced highly automated machine learning Python framework for data-driven geochemistry discovery

This project is a Digital Twinbased predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.

Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.
LLM implementations with AIX machine learning framework.
Algorithmic Trading in Python with Machine Learning

A Python-based framework designed to quantify risk in Bitcoin trading using Probabilistic Machine Learning. Most ML models fail in crypto because they ignore oratorical uncertainty (the inherent randomness of the market). This repo provides tools to build models that don't just predict the next move
An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

Machine Learningbased intelligent test selection framework for CI/CD pipelines. Uses commit history, test execution data, and ML models to predict and run only relevant tests to accelerate regression cycles.
This is a machine learning framework for predicting compressive strength of carbon foams using ensemble regression (Random Forest + XGBoost) with interactive Streamlit deployment.
A machine learning-based framework to distinguish nuclear recoils from electronic backgrounds in gaseous NEWS-G-style detectors.

This repo contains BACKEND concepts and projects using different BACKEND frameworks like Express and FAST API. We will cover FAST API generally and also especially  machine learning that how we will make APIs for machine learning models.
This repository contains input files and code for a two-stage machine learning framework used to predict FOAs.

RESTful API for vector similarity search using the Python web framework FastAPI and a REDIS vector database.  This accelerates machine learning workflows that require vector similarity search using classification models.

Machine learning models for predicting postoperative delirium from perioperative EHR data, including baseline models, domain-structured ensembles, interpretability, calibration, and decision curve analysis.
A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

A Universal Customer Churn Prediction System is an advanced analytics framework designed to identify which customers are likely to stop using a service or product. The "universal" system is built to be industry-agnostic, capable of processing diverse data streamsfrom banking transactions to telecom usageusing a unified machine learning pipeline.
Cloud-agnostic, containerized CodePulse orchestrates scalable, intelligent, distributed workloads with and AI-driven insights within a robust Machine Learning Framework.

A from-scratch Machine Learning reviewer library focused on understanding the math behind the code. Built as a learning project featuring custom implementations of core algorithms, gradient descent, and model evaluation without relying heavily on high-level ML frameworks.
A from-scratch C# machine learning framework with no dependencies
Machine Learning based framework for estimation of Effective Population Size(Ne) from genetic summary statistics

Developed a Python-based ensemble machine learning framework to predict directional price movement for a multi-asset basket (AAPL, GE, PSCT). The project focuses on bridging the gap between predictive modeling and institutional risk management.
Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets

In competitive industries like telecoms, retaining customers is as vital as gaining them. Using real-world data, this churn research project analyzes why users leave and how to stop it. By leveraging machine learning and predictive modeling, I translate data into business strategies, creating a framework to maintain an engaged, loyal customer base.
Machine Learning Framework for Fairness Evaluation in Emergency Department Triage Predictions
This project implements a cross-cohort machine learning framework for disease prediction using gut microbiome and metabolomics data across 14 independent cohorts.
An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.
Personalized, AI-driven financial wellness engines leveraging encrypted data vaults machine learning workflows within a resilient, distributed ecosystem framework.
An AI-driven multi-agent trading platform for options trading and stock trends analysis. This project leverages advanced machine learning, real-time market data, and a modular multi-agent framework.
A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.
Machine learning framework for inferring interaction-dependent features from simulated STM-derived Fourier-transformed local density of states (FT-LDOS) images in TBG moir systems.
Aegis is a decentralized machine learning framework designed to predict heart disease risk without compromising patient privacy.
A lightweight, framework-agnostic gRPC library for serving machine learning models in Python.
Production-ready machine learning pipeline framework with automated feature engineering and experiment tracking.

LexTransition AI is an open-source, offline-first legal assistant. It helps users navigate the transition from old Indian laws (IPC/CrPC/IEA) to the new **BNS/BNSS/BSA** frameworks. Using local Machine Learning and OCR, it analyzes legal documents and maps law sections with 100% grounded accuracy.
Will be conducting Portfolio Optimisation based on set asset universe and will be using Machine Learning Techniques to do so.

This repository contains the relevant code and information for constructing the interpretable spatial machine learning modeling framework.

PyCluster is a Windows-optimized distributed computing framework built on Dask that simplifies cluster orchestration, task parallelism, and AI workload management.  It provides a head nodeworker architecture with real-time dashboard monitoring, REST API integration, and optional GPU awareness for machine learning and lLLM workloads.
An automated framework for identifying harmonic-generating loads in power systems using Current Signature Analysis (CSA) and Machine Learning classifiers like SVM and Random Forest.

An AI-based behavioural analytics system that detects and predicts impulsive spending patterns in young adults using transaction data, machine learning models, and a composite risk scoring framework, supported by personalized financial nudges for proactive financial wellness.
Machine Learning with the Circumpunct Framework
High-Performance, Machine-Learning-Driven KeyForge Architecture Leverages Scalable, Intelligent, Distributed Systems for Real-Time Data Processing and Analytics Framework.
Machine learning framework

A comprehensive machine learning governance framework (Master's Thesis) designed to monitor the intersection of data drift, Explainable AI (SHAP/LIME), and algorithmic fairness over time in financial risk models.

This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

OxyFormer is a causal AI framework for estimating the effects of altitude-derived oxygen exposure on cancer outcomes, combining attention-based   tabular transformer pretraining with orthogonal double machine learning, site-level heterogeneity analysis, and technical white-paper reporting.

This project develops a predictive targeting framework to optimize marketing spend. By ranking customers by response probability, it captures ~83% of responders while targeting only the top 30%, increasing response rate from 15% to ~42%. It shows how machine learning drives cost-efficient, data-driven marketing decisions.
Study of Machine Learning and Data Science using Python and Frameworks - Theory and Projects

The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

This repository contains the complete analytical pipeline for a study on fish freshness classification. The analysis leverages advanced machine learning methods implemented within the mlr3 framework, enabling robust model training, evaluation, and comparison.
In this repository different AI/ML algorithms are implemented by using PyTorch framework for learning purpose.
DistroML is an enterprise-grade distributed machine learning training framework designed to accelerate deep learning workflows across multiple GPUs, nodes, and cloud environments.
